features.title: Phase 0 — Quick wins (0a upload gate, 0b reindex cap, 0c memory CRUD, 0d checkpoint MCP)
Phase 1 — Memory-quality foundation (decay fn, LLM consolidation, durable sessions/jobs)
Phase 2 — Query understanding (LLM rewrite + HyDE, config-gated, silent-degrade)
Phase 3 — Passive memory capture (hook ingestion, Observation store, single-writer queue + 429, consolidation bridge, hook scripts)
Phase 4 — Bootstrap from repo (scan git/README/docs/manifests/centrality → LLM/rule-based seed memories, idempotent, bootstrap:completed event)
Phase 6 — Cross-session handoffs (HandoffStore + HandoffService begin/accept/cancel/listPending + dual-write memory + handoff:accepted event + auto-injector + MCP tools + route)

Phase 5 — Auto-improvement loop (ProposalStore + AutoImproveJob rule-based pattern detection + LLM-optional enrichment + review-gate/auto-approve + apply/reject state machine + memory:auto-improved event + MCP tools + route)
Phase 7 — Retrieval + compression polish (reranker, salience-judge, graph BFS stream, LLM compression, chromadb dead-code removal)

Phase 8 — Web UI [G5] (read-only HTML browser over SQLite memories + FTS5 search + handoffs + checkpoints + indexed projects, served via Tools API, vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, markdown + dark mode, no new core logic)
